name: Sync Engine
summary: Coordinates project synchronization by spawning external CLI processes. Streams progress updates via SSE, archives previous data before sync, and handles cancellation.
goals: Spawn and monitor sync CLI processes with argument passing
Stream real-time sync progress to connected SSE clients
Archive previous spec data before running a new sync

acceptanceCriteria.given: A sync is not in progress
acceptanceCriteria.then: a CLI process is spawned and progress events stream to the client
the CLI process is terminated and previous data is restored

unit-test.then: the second request is rejected with a conflict status

end-to-end.then: progress events are streamed and the sync completes with valid output

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: feat(sync-specs): add auto-detection status rules in Step 5 user review
